description:
You are an edge-computing engineer preparing a very small “deployment package” for three new IoT sensor nodes.  
Complete the following steps entirely from the Linux terminal.  
(The automated checker will look **exactly** for the paths, file names and file contents described below, so be precise.)

1. Make sure the directory  
   /home/user/edge_configs  
   exists.

2. Inside /home/user/edge_configs create a plain-text file named  
   edge_device_list.txt  
   whose entire content is **exactly** (three lines, no extra blank lines or spaces):  
   sensor-alpha  
   sensor-beta  
   sensor-gamma

3. Create another directory  
   /home/user/deploy_package

4. Move the file edge_device_list.txt into /home/user/deploy_package **and** rename it to  
   devices_to_push.list

5. Still inside /home/user/deploy_package create a log file named deploy.log that contains one single line, precisely:  
   CREATED: 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z edge_device_list.txt -> devices_to_push.list

Summary of the required final state:

• /home/user/edge_configs  (directory exists but now empty)  
• /home/user/deploy_package/devices_to_push.list  (file contains the three device IDs)  
• /home/user/deploy_package/deploy.log  (file contains the one log line shown above)

No other files should be changed or created.

Hints: Standard shell utilities (mkdir, echo, mv, etc.) are sufficient; the whole job normally takes just two or three commands.  
Do not print anything extra to deploy.log and do not add timestamps other than the fixed one given above.
truth:
Required objects after successful completion:

1. Directory /home/user/edge_configs must exist and be empty.

2. Directory /home/user/deploy_package must exist and contain two files:

   a. /home/user/deploy_package/devices_to_push.list  
      Contents (including trailing newline at end of file):
sensor-alpha
sensor-beta
sensor-gamma
<newline>

   b. /home/user/deploy_package/deploy.log  
      Contents (single line, ending with newline):
CREATED: 2023-01-01T00:00:00Z edge_device_list.txt -> devices_to_push.list
<newline>

3. No file named /home/user/edge_configs/edge_device_list.txt should remain; it must have been moved.

Permissions: all newly created files default to 644 (-rw-r--r--) and directories to 755 (drwxr-xr-x); these are acceptable for the tests.

The test suite will verify:
• Existence and emptiness of /home/user/edge_configs  
• Existence of /home/user/deploy_package  
• Exact contents of devices_to_push.list (three lines, correct spelling, newline termination, nothing else)  
• Exact contents of deploy.log (one line, correct text, newline termination, nothing else)
